feature.name: CSS contrast-color()
feature.creator: futhark@chromium.org
feature.summary:
This function is used to meet contrast requirements for accessibility.

The contrast-color() function can be used anywhere in CSS where a color value is expected. It takes a color value argument, and returns either 'black' or 'white' depending on which of them gives the highest contrast against the color argument.
